children.text: Rollup is a module bundler for JavaScript which compiles small pieces of code into something larger and more complex,

rects.text: Rollup is a module bundler for JavaScript which compiles small pieces of code into something larger and more complex,

children.text: such as a library or application. It uses the standardized ES module format for code, instead of previous idiosyncratic

rects.text: such as a library or application. It uses the standardized ES module format for code, instead of previous idiosyncratic

children.text: solutions such as CommonJS and AMD. ES modules let you freely and seamlessly combine the most useful individual

rects.text: solutions such as CommonJS and AMD. ES modules let you freely and seamlessly combine the most useful individual

children.text: functions from your favorite libraries. Rollup can optimize ES modules for faster native loading in modern browsers, or

rects.text: functions from your favorite libraries. Rollup can optimize ES modules for faster native loading in modern browsers, or

children.text: output a legacy module format allowing ES module workflows today.

rects.text: output a legacy module format allowing ES module workflows today.
